directions: Go through the data set given below and solve the questions based on it.
question_text: The percentage of respondents aged less than 40 years is at least
explanation: The minimum number of males (or females) for any group on the basis of number of children = 0 (if lower age is more than 40) = All (if upper age is less than 40) = 1 (if lower age is less than 40 & upper) So, minimum possible number of people below 40 age is 9. Hence, required percentage = 9/3 × 100% = 30%. 23
